identity: StudyBrain - Intelligent, objective, structured, and memory-focused learning engine.

headings.instruction: Never center by default. Left align. Use fluid clamp for massive sizes up to text-6xl.

body.instruction: Clean, highly readable text for learning materials.

mono.instruction: CRITICAL: Use for AI outputs, timestamps, memory metrics, tags, and data visualization labels.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Swiss grid strategy. Exposed structural elements. Generous spacing (p-8 to p-24) to create tension.
layout_and_spacing.marketing: Mode A 'Tetris' grid. Asymmetrical layouts. Extremely generous padding. No centering.
layout_and_spacing.app: Mode B 'Control Room' grid. Strict grid hierarchy, dense but clear. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Exposed grids. 1px or 2px solid black borders for all major containers to create a blueprint feel.
layout_and_spacing.radius: Sharp edges. rounded-none or maximum rounded-sm (2px) globally. No soft UI.

components.cards: Flat solid background, sharp 1px black border. No soft drop shadows. On hover: translate-y-[-2px] with solid black hard shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0_#0A0A0A]).
components.buttons: Sharp edges, high contrast. Primary: Solid Klein Blue (#002FA7) background, white text. Secondary: Transparent background, 1px black border. Hover state MUST change color explicitly.
components.navigation: Solid off-white or stark white background. Hard bottom border. Not glassmorphism, stick to solid/brutalist structure.
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use Primary Blue, Highlighter Yellow, and Deep Black for data series.
components.inputs: Flat background, 1px solid black border. Focus state must have an intense black ring or blue ring.

icons_and_animations.icons: lucide-react. Keep them functional and sharp.
icons_and_animations.animations: Minimal and snappy. No slow floats. Use transform 0.15s ease-out.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA standards. Black text on off-white or highlighter yellow.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST have data-testid in kebab-case.

main_agent_instructions.1: Update tailwind.config.js to map these custom hsl colors. Set radius to 0 or 2px globally to enforce the sharp, Swiss look.
main_agent_instructions.2: Import 'Outfit', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts and map them in tailwind.config.js as sans, serif, and mono respectively.
main_agent_instructions.3: Build the marketing page emphasizing the 'Blueprint' and 'Hindsight Memory' concepts using exposed grids and hard borders.
main_agent_instructions.4: In the app dashboard and chat interface, heavily customize Shadcn components to remove rounding and soft shadows, replacing them with brutalist 1px borders.
main_agent_instructions.5: Do NOT use default fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Lato. NEVER use purple/violet gradients.
main_agent_instructions.6: Use the provided media URLs. The hero_image_url should be used for the main conceptual visual of the AI engine.
